name: Downbeat plus two beats
description: A simple chaser that flashes the par cans and mini beams on the downbeat and two beats after.

name: Parcans left to right blue
description: A simple chaser that flashes the par cans from left to right in blue.

name: Parcans left to right
description: A simple chaser that flashes the par cans from left to right.

name: Parcan heartbeat
description: A two-beat lub-dub motif for the parcans: left pair on the pulse, right pair as the answer, then a brief breath before the next cycle.

name: Blue Indigo Wave Chaser 2 Bars
description: A two-bar low blue-indigo wave for the RGB floor cans only: proton and parcan fixtures rise and fall in staggered fades, with no moving heads involved.

name: Indigo Blue Step Wave Lr 2 Bars
description: A two-bar indigo-blue step wave for the RGB floor cans only, using one-beat directional red chases over a soft blue bed.

name: Indigo Blue Step Wave Rl 2 Bars
description: A two-bar indigo-blue step wave for the RGB floor cans only, using one-beat directional red chases over a soft blue bed.

name: Yonaka Intro
description: Four-bar intro motif: left/right prism plus opposite parcans, with a double-punch on the cycle start.

name: Sea Waves Right To Left
description: A calm 4-bar underwater parcan wave with half-beat sine-stepped blue/green modulation flowing right-to-left over a deep blue base.
